title: hieracium calcareum subsp. morlonense
intro: Hieracium calcareum subsp. morlonense, also known as the calcarous hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The calcarous hawkweed has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Hieracium calcareum subsp. morlonense can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in natural remedies and folk medicine.
